title: habenaria stylites subsp. johnsonii
intro: Habenaria stylites subsp. johnsonii, also known as the Johnson's Spider Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Western Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Johnson's Spider Orchid include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
